CustomField.description: Business days (Mon-Fri, weekends excluded) from the gift date (Close Date) to the Acknowledgment Date if set, otherwise to today. Once the gift is acknowledged (date stamped), the count FREEZES = business days it took to acknowledge. Drives the 48-hour (2 business day) SLA report. JSI-87 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( IF(NOT(ISBLANK(npsp__Acknowledgment_Date__c)), npsp__Acknowledgment_Date__c, TODAY()) - DATE(1900,1,8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN(5, MOD( IF(NOT(ISBLANK(npsp__Acknowledgment_Date__c)), npsp__Acknowledgment_Date__c, TODAY()) - DATE(1900,1,8), 7 ))) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( CloseDate - DATE(1900,1,8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN(5, MOD( CloseDate - DATE(1900,1,8), 7 )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Business days since the gift date. Used for the 48-hour (2 business day) acknowledgment SLA.
CustomField.label: Acknowledgment Age (Business Days)
